'''shanubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wulliwa|wulliwa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wulliwa|wulliwa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shanubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shænibith|shænibith]] || [[word:shænibij|shænibij]] || [[word:shænibish|shænibish]] || [[word:shænibi|shænibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanunubuth|shanunubuth]] || [[word:shanunubuj|shanunubuj]] || [[word:shanunubush|shanunubush]] || [[word:shanunubu|shanunubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanubuth|shanubuth]] || [[word:shanubuj|shanubuj]] || [[word:shanubush|shanubush]] || [[word:shanubu|shanubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanufbuth|shanufbuth]] || [[word:shanufbuj|shanufbuj]] || [[word:shanufbush|shanufbush]] || [[word:shanufbuf|shanufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanubuthu|shanubuthu]] || [[word:shanubuju|shanubuju]] || [[word:shanubushu|shanubushu]] || [[word:shanubuku|shanubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanubuth|shanubuth]] || [[word:shanubuj|shanubuj]] || [[word:shanubush|shanubush]] || [[word:shanubu|shanubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanubuthul|shanubuthul]] || [[word:shanubujul|shanubujul]] || [[word:shanubushul|shanubushul]] || [[word:shanubukul|shanubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanubuthuthu|shanubuthuthu]] || [[word:shanubujuju|shanubujuju]] || [[word:shanubushushu|shanubushushu]] || [[word:shanubuku|shanubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanubuthun|shanubuthun]] || [[word:shanubujun|shanubujun]] || [[word:shanubushun|shanubushun]] || [[word:shanubukun|shanubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanubuthuoro|shanubuthuoro]] || [[word:shanubujuoro|shanubujuoro]] || [[word:shanubushuoro|shanubushuoro]] || [[word:shanubukuoro|shanubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
